text: apokalypsis iēsou christou ēn edōken autō o theos deixai tois doulois autou a dei genesthai en tachei kai esēmanen aposteilas dia tou angelou autou tō doulō autou iōannē
os emartyrēsen ton logon tou theou kai tēn martyrian iēsou christou osa te eiden
makarios o anaginōskōn kai oi akouontes tous logous tēs prophēteias kai tērountes ta en autē gegrammena o gar kairos engys
iōannēs tais epta ekklēsiais tais en tē asia charis ymin kai eirēnē apo tou o ōn kai o ēn kai o erchomenos kai apo tōn epta pneumatōn a estin enōpion tou thronou autou
kai apo iēsou christou o martys o pistos o prōtotokos ek tōn nekrōn kai o archōn tōn basileōn tēs gēs tō agapēsanti ēmas kai lousanti ēmas apo tōn amartiōn ēmōn en tō aimati autou
kai epoiēsen ēmas basileis kai iereis tō theō kai patri autou autō ē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
idou erchetai meta tōn nephelōn kai opsetai auton pas ophthalmos kai oitines auton exekentēsan kai kopsontai ep auton pasai ai phylai tēs gēs nai amēn
egō eimi to a kai to ō archē kai telos legei o kyrios o ōn kai o ēn kai o erchomenos o pantokratōr

egō iōannēs o kai adelphos ymōn kai synkoinōnos en tē thlipsei kai en tē basileia kai ypomonē iēsou christou egenomēn en tē nēsō tē kaloumenē patmō dia ton logon tou theou kai dia tēn martyrian iēsou christou
egenomēn en pneumati en tē kyriakē ēmera kai ēkousa opisō mou phōnēn megalēn ōs salpingos

legousēs egō eimi to a kai to ō o prōtos kai o eschatos kai o blepeis grapson eis biblion kai pempson tais ekklēsiais tais en asia eis epheson kai eis smyrnan kai eis pergamon kai eis thyateira kai eis sardeis kai eis philadelpheian kai eis laodikeian
kai epestrepsa blepein tēn phōnēn ētis elalēsen met emou kai epistrepsas eidon epta lychnias chrysas
kai en mesō tōn epta lychniōn omoion uiō anthrōpou endedymenon podērē kai periezōsmenon pros tois mastois zōnēn chrysēn
ē de kephalē autou kai ai triches leukai ōsei erion leukon ōs chiōn kai oi ophthalmoi autou ōs phlox pyros
kai oi podes autou omoioi chalkolibanō ōs en kaminō pepyrōmenoi kai ē phōnē autou ōs phōnē ydatōn pollōn
kai echōn en tē dexia autou cheiri asteras epta kai ek tou stomatos autou romphaia distomos oxeia ekporeuomenē kai ē opsis autou ōs o ēlios phainei en tē dynamei autou
kai ote eidon auton epesa pros tous podas autou ōs nekros kai epethēken tēn dexian autou cheira ep eme legōn moi mē phobou egō eimi o prōtos kai o eschatos
kai o zōn kai egenomēn nekros kai idou zōn eimi eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn kai echō tas kleis tou adou kai tou thanatou
grapson a eides kai a eisin kai a mellei ginesthai meta tauta
to mystērion tōn epta asterōn ōn eides epi tēs dexias mou kai tas epta lychnias tas chrysas oi epta asteres angeloi tōn epta ekklēsiōn eisin kai ai epta lychniai as eides epta ekklēsiai eisin
tō angelō tēs ephesinēs ekklēsias grapson tade legei o kratōn tous epta asteras en tē dexia autou o peripatōn en mesō tōn epta lychniōn tōn chrysōn
oida ta erga sou kai ton kopon sou kai tēn ypomonēn sou kai oti ou dynē bastasai kakous kai epeirasō tous phaskontas einai apostolous kai ouk eisin kai eures autous pseudeis
kai ebastasas kai ypomonēn echeis kai dia to onoma mou kekopiakas kai ou kekmēkas
all echō kata sou oti tēn agapēn sou tēn prōtēn aphēkas
mnēmoneue oun pothen ekpeptōkas kai metanoēson kai ta prōta erga poiēson ei de mē erchomai soi tachy kai kinēsō tēn lychnian sou ek tou topou autēs ean mē metanoēsēs
alla touto echeis oti miseis ta erga tōn nikolaitōn a kagō misō
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais tō nikōnti dōsō autō phagein ek tou xylou tēs zōēs o estin en mesō tou paradeisou tou theou
kai tō angelō tēs ekklēsias smyrnaiōn grapson tade legei o prōtos kai o eschatos os egeneto nekros kai ezēsen
oida sou ta erga kai tēn thlipsin kai tēn ptōcheian plousios de ei kai tēn blasphēmian tōn legontōn ioudaious einai eautous kai ouk eisin alla synagōgē tou satana
mēden phobou a melleis paschein idou mellei balein ex ymōn o diabolos eis phylakēn ina peirasthēte kai exete thlipsin ēmerōn deka ginou pistos achri thanatou kai dōsō soi ton stephanon tēs zōēs
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais o nikōn ou mē adikēthē ek tou thanatou tou deuterou
kai tō angelō tēs en pergamō ekklēsias grapson tade legei o echōn tēn romphaian tēn distomon tēn oxeian

oida ta erga sou kai pou katoikeis opou o thronos tou satana kai krateis to onoma mou kai ouk ērnēsō tēn pistin mou kai en tais ēmerais en ais antipas o martys mou o pistos os apektanthē par ymin opou katoikei o satanas
all echō kata sou oliga oti echeis ekei kratountas tēn didachēn balaam os edidasken ton balak balein skandalon enōpion tōn uiōn israēl phagein eidōlothyta kai porneusai
outōs echeis kai sy kratountas tēn didachēn tōn nikolaitōn o misō
metanoēson ei de mē erchomai soi tachy kai polemēsō met autōn en tē romphaia tou stomatos mou

o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais tō nikōnti dōsō autō phagein apo tou manna tou kekrymmenou kai dōsō autō psēphon leukēn kai epi tēn psēphon onoma kainon gegrammenon o oudeis egnō ei mē o lambanōn
kai tō angelō tēs en thyateirois ekklēsias grapson tade legei o uios tou theou o echōn tous ophthalmous autou ōs phloga pyros kai oi podes autou omoioi chalkolibanō
oida sou ta erga kai tēn agapēn kai tēn diakonian kai tēn pistin kai tēn ypomonēn sou kai ta erga sou kai ta eschata pleiona tōn prōtōn
all echō kata sou oliga oti eas tēn gynaika iezabēl tēn legousan eautēn prophētin didaskein kai planasthai emous doulous porneusai kai eidōlothyta phagein
kai edōka autē chronon ina metanoēsē ek tēs porneias autēs kai ou metenoēsen
idou egō ballō autēn eis klinēn kai tous moicheuontas met autēs eis thlipsin megalēn ean mē metanoēsōsin ek tōn ergōn autōn
kai ta tekna autēs apoktenō en thanatō kai gnōsontai pasai ai ekklēsiai oti egō eimi o ereunōn nephrous kai kardias kai dōsō ymin ekastō kata ta erga ymōn
ymin de legō kai loipois tois en thyateirois osoi ouk echousin tēn didachēn tautēn kai oitines ouk egnōsan ta bathē tou satana ōs legousin ou balō eph ymas allo baros
plēn o echete kratēsate achris ou an ēxō
kai o nikōn kai o tērōn achri telous ta erga mou dōsō autō exousian epi tōn ethnōn
kai poimanei autous en rabdō sidēra ōs ta skeuē ta keramika syntribetai ōs kagō eilēpha para tou patros mou
kai dōsō autō ton astera ton prōinon
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais
kai tō angelō tēs en sardesin ekklēsias grapson tade legei o echōn ta epta pneumata tou theou kai tous epta asteras oida sou ta erga oti to onoma echeis oti zēs kai nekros ei
ginou grēgorōn kai stērixon ta loipa a mellei apothanein ou gar eurēka sou ta erga peplērōmena enōpion tou theou
mnēmoneue oun pōs eilēphas kai ēkousas kai tērei kai metanoēson ean oun mē grēgorēsēs ēxō epi se ōs kleptēs kai ou mē gnōs poian ōran ēxō epi se
echeis oliga onomata kai en sardesin a ouk emolynan ta imatia autōn kai peripatēsousin met emou en leukois oti axioi eisin
o nikōn outos peribaleitai en imatiois leukois kai ou mē exaleipsō to onoma autou ek tēs biblou tēs zōēs kai exomologēsomai to onoma autou enōpion tou patros mou kai enōpion tōn angelōn autou
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais
kai tō angelō tēs en philadelpheia ekklēsias grapson tade legei o agios o alēthinos o echōn tēn kleida tou dabid o anoigōn kai oudeis kleiei kai kleiei kai oudeis anoigei
oida sou ta erga idou dedōka enōpion sou thyran aneōgmenēn kai oudeis dynatai kleisai autēn oti mikran echeis dynamin kai etērēsas mou ton logon kai ouk ērnēsō to onoma mou

idou didōmi ek tēs synagōgēs tou satana tōn legontōn eautous ioudaious einai kai ouk eisin alla pseudontai idou poiēsō autous ina ēxōsin kai proskynēsōsin enōpion tōn podōn sou kai gnōsin oti egō ēgapēsa se
oti etērēsas ton logon tēs ypomonēs mou kagō se tērēsō ek tēs ōras tou peirasmou tēs mellousēs erchesthai epi tēs oikoumenēs olēs peirasai tous katoikountas epi tēs gēs
idou erchomai tachy kratei o echeis ina mēdeis labē ton stephanon sou

o nikōn poiēsō auton stylon en tō tou theou mou kai exō ou mē exelthē eti kai grapsō ep auton to onoma tou theou mou kai to onoma tēs poleōs tou theou mou tēs kainēs ierousalēm ē katabainei ek tou ouranou apo tou theou mou kai to onoma mou to kainon
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais
kai tō angelō tēs ekklēsias laodikeōn grapson tade legei o amēn o martys o pistos kai alēthinos ē archē tēs ktiseōs tou theou
oida sou ta erga oti oute psychros ei oute zestos ophelon psychros eiēs ē zestos
outōs oti chliaros ei kai oute psychros oute zestos mellō se emesai ek tou stomatos mou
oti legeis oti plousios eimi kai peploutēka kai oudenos chreian echō kai ouk oidas oti sy ei o talaipōros kai eleeinos kai ptōchos kai typhlos kai gymnos

symbouleuō soi agorasai par emou chrysion pepyrōmenon ek pyros ina ploutēsēs kai imatia leuka ina peribalē kai mē phanerōthē ē aischynē tēs gymnotētos sou kai kollourion enchrison tous ophthalmous sou ina blepēs
egō osous ean philō elenchō kai paideuō zēlōson oun kai metanoēson
idou estēka epi tēn thyran kai krouō ean tis akousē tēs phōnēs mou kai anoixē tēn thyran eiseleusomai pros auton kai deipnēsō met autou kai autos met emou
o nikōn dōsō autō kathisai met emou en tō thronō mou ōs kagō enikēsa kai ekathisa meta tou patros mou en tō thronō autou
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais
meta tauta eidon kai idou thyra ēneōgmenē en tō ouranō kai ē phōnē ē prōtē ēn ēkousa ōs salpingos lalousēs met emou legousa anaba ōde kai deixō soi a dei genesthai meta tauta
kai eutheōs egenomēn en pneumati kai idou thronos ekeito en tō ouranō kai epi tou thronou kathēmenos
kai o kathēmenos ēn omoios orasei lithō iaspidi kai sardinō kai iris kyklothen tou thronou omoia orasei smaragdinō

kai kyklothen tou thronou thronoi eikosi kai tessares kai epi tous thronous eidon tous eikosi kai tessaras presbyterous kathēmenous peribeblēmenous en imatiois leukois kai eschon epi tas kephalas autōn stephanous chrysous
kai ek tou thronou ekporeuontai astrapai kai brontai kai phōnai kai epta lampades pyros kaiomenai enōpion tou thronou ai eisin ta epta pneumata tou theou
kai enōpion tou thronou thalassa yalinē omoia krystallō kai en mesō tou thronou kai kyklō tou thronou tessara zōa gemonta ophthalmōn emprosthen kai opisthen
kai to zōon to prōton omoion leonti kai to deuteron zōon omoion moschō kai to triton zōon echon to prosōpon ōs anthrōpos kai to tetarton zōon omoion aetō petōmenō

kai tessara zōa en kath eauto eichon ana pterygas ex kyklothen kai esōthen gemonta ophthalmōn kai anapausin ouk echousin ēmeras kai nyktos legonta agios agios agios kyrios o theos o pantokratōr o ēn kai o ōn kai o erchomenos
kai otan dōsousin ta zōa doxan kai timēn kai eucharistian tō kathēmenō epi tou thronou tō zōnti eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn

pesountai oi eikosi kai tessares presbyteroi enōpion tou kathēmenou epi tou thronou kai proskynēsousin tō zōnti eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn kai balousin tous stephanous autōn enōpion tou thronou legontes
axios ei kyrie labein tēn doxan kai tēn timēn kai tēn dynamin oti sy ektisas ta panta kai dia to thelēma sou eisin kai ektisthēsan
kai eidon epi tēn dexian tou kathēmenou epi tou thronou biblion gegrammenon esōthen kai opisthen katesphragismenon sphragisin epta
kai eidon angelon ischyron kēryssonta phōnē megalē tis estin axios anoixai to biblion kai lysai tas sphragidas autou
kai oudeis ēdynato en tō ouranō oude epi tēs gēs oude ypokatō tēs gēs anoixai to biblion oude blepein auto
kai egō eklaion polla oti oudeis axios eurethē anoixai kai anagnōnai to biblion oute blepein auto
kai eis ek tōn presbyterōn legei moi mē klaie idou enikēsen o leōn o ōn ek tēs phylēs iouda ē riza dabid anoixai to biblion kai lysai tas epta sphragidas autou

kai eidon kai idou en mesō tou thronou kai tōn tessarōn zōōn kai en mesō tōn presbyterōn arnion estēkos ōs esphagmenon echon kerata epta kai ophthalmous epta oi eisin ta epta tou theou pneumata ta apestalmena eis pasan tēn gēn
kai ēlthen kai eilēphen to biblion ek tēs dexias tou kathēmenou epi tou thronou

kai ote elaben to biblion ta tessara zōa kai oi eikositessares presbyteroi epeson enōpion tou arniou echontes ekastos kitharas kai phialas chrysas gemousas thymiamatōn ai eisin ai proseuchai tōn agiōn
kai adousin ōdēn kainēn legontes axios ei labein to biblion kai anoixai tas sphragidas autou oti esphagēs kai ēgorasas tō theō ēmas en tō aimati sou ek pasēs phylēs kai glōssēs kai laou kai ethnous
kai epoiēsas ēmas tō theō ēmōn basileis kai iereis kai basileusomen epi tēs gēs
kai eidon kai ēkousa phōnēn angelōn pollōn kyklothen tou thronou kai tōn zōōn kai tōn presbyterōn kai ēn o arithmos autōn myriades myriadōn kai chiliades chiliadōn
legontes phōnē megalē axion estin to arnion to esphagmenon labein tēn dynamin kai plouton kai sophian kai ischyn kai timēn kai doxan kai eulogian

kai pan ktisma o estin en tō ouranō kai en tē gē kai ypokatō tēs gēs kai epi tēs thalassēs a estin kai ta en autois panta ēkousa legontas tō kathēmenō epi tou thronou kai tō arniō ē eulogia kai ē timē kai ē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn
kai ta tessara zōa elegon amēn kai oi eikositessares presbyteroi epesan kai prosekynēsan zōnti eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn
kai eidon ote ēnoixen to arnion mian ek tōn sphragidōn kai ēkousa enos ek tōn tessarōn zōōn legontos ōs phōnēs brontēs erchou kai blepe
kai eidon kai idou ippos leukos kai o kathēmenos ep autō echōn toxon kai edothē autō stephanos kai exēlthen nikōn kai ina nikēsē
kai ote ēnoixen tēn deuteran sphragida ēkousa tou deuterou zōou legontos erchou kai blepe
kai exēlthen allos ippos pyrros kai tō kathēmenō ep autō edothē autō labein tēn eirēnēn apo tēs gēs kai ina allēlous sphaxōsin kai edothē autō machaira megalē
kai ote ēnoixen tēn tritēn sphragida ēkousa tou tritou zōou legontos erchou kai blepe kai eidon kai idou ippos melas kai o kathēmenos ep autō echōn zygon en tē cheiri autou
kai ēkousa phōnēn en mesō tōn tessarōn zōōn legousan choinix sitou dēnariou kai treis choinikes krithēs dēnariou kai to elaion kai ton oinon mē adikēsēs
kai ote ēnoixen tēn sphragida tēn tetartēn ēkousa phōnēn tou tetartou zōou legousan erchou kai blepe

kai eidon kai idou ippos chlōros kai o kathēmenos epanō autou onoma autō o thanatos kai o adēs akolouthei met autou kai edothē autois exousia apokteinai epi to tetarton tēs gēs en romphaia kai en limō kai en thanatō kai ypo tōn thēriōn tēs gēs
kai ote ēnoixen tēn pemptēn sphragida eidon ypokatō tou thysiastēriou tas psychas tōn esphagmenōn dia ton logon tou theou kai dia tēn martyrian ēn eichon
kai ekrazon phōnē megalē legontes eōs pote o despotēs o agios kai o alēthinos ou krineis kai ekdikeis to aima ēmōn apo tōn katoikountōn epi tēs gēs
kai edothēsan ekastois stolai leukai kai errethē autois ina anapausōntai eti chronon mikron eōs ou plērōsontai kai oi syndouloi autōn kai oi adelphoi autōn oi mellontes apokteinesthai ōs kai autoi
kai eidon ote ēnoixen tēn sphragida tēn ektēn kai idou seismos megas egeneto kai o ēlios egeneto melas ōs sakkos trichinos kai ē selēnē egeneto ōs aima
kai oi asteres tou ouranou epesan eis tēn gēn ōs sykē ballei tous olynthous autēs ypo megalou anemou seiomenē
kai ouranos apechōristhē ōs biblion eilissomenon kai pan oros kai nēsos ek tōn topōn autōn ekinēthēsan
kai oi basileis tēs gēs kai oi megistanes kai oi plousioi kai oi chiliarchoi kai oi dynatoi kai pas doulos kai pas eleutheros ekrypsan eautous eis ta spēlaia kai eis tas petras tōn oreōn
kai legousin tois oresin kai tais petrais pesete eph ēmas kai krypsate ēmas apo prosōpou tou kathēmenou epi tou thronou kai apo tēs orgēs tou arniou
oti ēlthen ē ēmera ē megalē tēs orgēs autou kai tis dynatai stathēnai
kai meta tauta eidon tessaras angelous estōtas epi tas tessaras gōnias tēs gēs kratountas tous tessaras anemous tēs gēs ina mē pneē anemos epi tēs gēs mēte epi tēs thalassēs mēte epi pan dendron
kai eidon allon angelon anabanta apo anatolēs ēliou echonta sphragida theou zōntos kai ekraxen phōnē megalē tois tessarsin angelois ois edothē autois adikēsai tēn gēn kai tēn thalassan
legōn mē adikēsēte tēn gēn mēte tēn thalassan mēte ta dendra achris ou sphragisōmen tous doulous tou theou ēmōn epi tōn metōpōn autōn
kai ēkousa ton arithmon tōn esphragismenōn rmd chiliades esphragismenoi ek pasēs phylēs uiōn israēl
ek phylēs iouda ib chiliades esphragismenoi ek phylēs roubēn ib chiliades esphragismenoi ek phylēs gad ib chiliades esphragismenoi
ek phylēs asēr ib chiliades esphragismenoi ek phylēs nephthaleim ib chiliades esphragismenoi ek phylēs manassē ib chiliades esphragismenoi
ek phylēs symeōn ib chiliades esphragismenoi ek phylēs leui ib chiliades esphragismenoi ek phylēs isaschar ib chiliades esphragismenoi
ek phylēs zaboulōn ib chiliades esphragismenoi ek phylēs iōsēph ib chiliades esphragismenoi ek phylēs beniamin ib chiliades esphragismenoi

meta tauta eidon kai idou ochlos polys on arithmēsai auton oudeis ēdynato ek pantos ethnous kai phylōn kai laōn kai glōssōn estōtes enōpion tou thronou kai enōpion tou arniou peribeblēmenoi stolas leukas kai phoinikes en tais chersin autōn
kai krazontes phōnē megalē legontes ē sōtēria tō theō ēmōn tō kathēmenō epi tou thronou kai tō arniō
kai pantes oi angeloi estēkesan kyklō tou thronou kai tōn presbyterōn kai tōn tessarōn zōōn kai epeson enōpion tou thronou epi prosōpon autōn kai prosekynēsan tō theō
legontes amēn ē eulogia kai ē doxa kai ē sophia kai ē eucharistia kai ē timē kai ē dynamis kai ē ischys tō theō ēmōn eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
kai apekrithē eis ek tōn presbyterōn legōn moi outoi oi peribeblēmenoi tas stolas tas leukas tines eisin kai pothen ēlthon
kai eirēka autō kyrie sy oidas kai eipen moi outoi eisin oi erchomenoi ek tēs thlipseōs tēs megalēs kai eplynan tas stolas autōn kai eleukanan stolas autōn en tō aimati tou arniou
dia touto eisin enōpion tou thronou tou theou kai latreuousin autō ēmeras kai nyktos en tō naō autou kai o kathēmenos epi tou thronou skēnōsei ep autous
ou peinasousin eti oude dipsēsousin eti oude mē pesē ep autous o ēlios oude pan kauma
oti to arnion to ana meson tou thronou poimanei autous kai odēgēsei autous epi zōsas pēgas ydatōn kai exaleipsei o theos pan dakryon apo tōn ophthalmōn autōn
kai ote ēnoixen tēn sphragida tēn ebdomēn egeneto sigē en tō ouranō ōs ēmiōrion
kai eidon tous epta angelous oi enōpion tou theou estēkasin kai edothēsan autois epta salpinges

kai allos angelos ēlthen kai estathē epi to thysiastērion echōn libanōton chrysoun kai edothē autō thymiamata polla ina dōsē tais proseuchais tōn agiōn pantōn epi to thysiastērion to chrysoun to enōpion tou thronou
kai anebē o kapnos tōn thymiamatōn tais proseuchais tōn agiōn ek cheiros tou angelou enōpion tou theou
kai eilēphen o angelos ton libanōton kai egemisen auton ek tou pyros tou thysiastēriou kai ebalen eis tēn gēn kai egenonto phōnai kai brontai kai astrapai kai seismos
kai oi epta angeloi echontes tas epta salpingas ētoimasan eautous ina salpisōsin
kai o prōtos angelos esalpisen kai egeneto chalaza kai pyr memigmena aimati kai eblēthē eis tēn gēn kai to triton tōn dendrōn katekaē kai pas chortos chlōros katekaē
kai o deuteros angelos esalpisen kai ōs oros mega pyri kaiomenon eblēthē eis tēn thalassan kai egeneto to triton tēs thalassēs aima
kai apethanen to triton tōn ktismatōn tōn en tē thalassē ta echonta psychas kai to triton tōn ploiōn diephtharē
kai o tritos angelos esalpisen kai epesen ek tou ouranou astēr megas kaiomenos ōs lampas kai epesen epi to triton tōn potamōn kai epi tas pēgas ydatōn
kai to onoma tou asteros legetai apsinthos kai ginetai to triton tōn ydatōn eis apsinthon kai polloi anthrōpōn apethanon ek tōn ydatōn oti epikranthēsan

kai o tetartos angelos esalpisen kai eplēgē to triton tou ēliou kai to triton tēs selēnēs kai to triton tōn asterōn ina skotisthē to triton autōn kai ē ēmera mē phainē to triton autēs kai ē nyx omoiōs

kai eidon kai ēkousa enos angelou petōmenou en mesouranēmati legontos phōnē megalē ouai ouai ouai tois katoikousin epi tēs gēs ek tōn loipōn phōnōn tēs salpingos tōn triōn angelōn tōn mellontōn salpizein
kai o pemptos angelos esalpisen kai eidon astera ek tou ouranou peptōkota eis tēn gēn kai edothē autō ē kleis tou phreatos tēs abyssou
kai ēnoixen to phrear tēs abyssou kai anebē kapnos ek tou phreatos ōs kapnos kaminou megalēs kai eskotisthē o ēlios kai o aēr ek tou kapnou tou phreatos
kai ek tou kapnou exēlthon akrides eis tēn gēn kai edothē autais exousia ōs echousin exousian oi skorpioi tēs gēs
kai errethē autais ina mē adikēsōsin ton chorton tēs gēs oude pan chlōron oude pan dendron ei mē tous anthrōpous monous oitines ouk echousin tēn sphragida tou theou epi tōn metōpōn autōn
kai edothē autais ina mē apokteinōsin autous all ina basanisthōsin mēnas pente kai o basanismos autōn ōs basanismos skorpiou otan paisē anthrōpon
kai en tais ēmerais ekeinais zētēsousin oi anthrōpoi ton thanaton kai ouch eurēsousin auton kai epithymēsousin apothanein kai pheuxetai o thanatos ap autōn
kai ta omoiōmata tōn akridōn omoia ippois ētoimasmenois eis polemon kai epi tas kephalas autōn ōs stephanoi omoioi chrysō kai ta prosōpa autōn ōs prosōpa anthrōpōn
kai eichon trichas ōs trichas gynaikōn kai oi odontes autōn ōs leontōn ēsan
kai eichon thōrakas ōs thōrakas sidērous kai ē phōnē tōn pterygōn autōn ōs phōnē armatōn ippōn pollōn trechontōn eis polemon
kai echousin ouras omoias skorpiois kai kentra ēn en tais ourais autōn kai ē exousia autōn adikēsai tous anthrōpous mēnas pente
kai echousin eph autōn basilea ton angelon tēs abyssou onoma autō ebraisti abaddōn kai en tē ellēnikē onoma echei apollyōn
ē ouai ē mia apēlthen idou erchontai eti dyo ouai meta tauta
kai o ektos angelos esalpisen kai ēkousa phōnēn mian ek tōn tessarōn keratōn tou thysiastēriou tou chrysou tou enōpion tou theou
legousan tō ektō angelō os eiche tēn salpinga lyson tous tessaras angelous tous dedemenous epi tō potamō tō megalō euphratē
kai elythēsan oi tessares angeloi oi ētoimasmenoi eis tēn ōran kai ēmeran kai mēna kai eniauton ina apokteinōsin to triton tōn anthrōpōn
kai o arithmos strateumatōn tou ippikou dyo myriades myriadōn kai ēkousa ton arithmon autōn

kai outōs eidon tous ippous en tē orasei kai tous kathēmenous ep autōn echontas thōrakas pyrinous kai yakinthinous kai theiōdeis kai ai kephalai tōn ippōn ōs kephalai leontōn kai ek tōn stomatōn autōn ekporeuetai pyr kai kapnos kai theion
ypo tōn triōn toutōn apektanthēsan to triton tōn anthrōpōn ek tou pyros kai ek tou kapnou kai ek tou theiou tou ekporeuomenou ek tōn stomatōn autōn
ai gar exousiai autōn en tō stomati autōn eisin ai gar ourai autōn omoiai ophesin echousai kephalas kai en autais adikousin

kai oi loipoi tōn anthrōpōn oi ouk apektanthēsan en tais plēgais tautais oute metenoēsan ek tōn ergōn tōn cheirōn autōn ina mē proskynēsōsin ta daimonia kai eidōla ta chrysa kai ta argyra kai ta chalka kai ta lithina kai ta xylina a oute blepein dynatai oute akouein oute peripatein
kai ou metenoēsan ek tōn phonōn autōn oute ek tōn pharmakeiōn autōn oute ek tēs porneias autōn oute ek tōn klemmatōn autōn
kai eidon allon angelon ischyron katabainonta ek tou ouranou peribeblēmenon nephelēn kai iris epi tēs kephalēs kai to prosōpon autou ōs o ēlios kai oi podes autou ōs styloi pyros
kai eichen en tē cheiri autou biblaridion aneōgmenon kai ethēken ton poda autou ton dexion epi tēn thalassan ton de euōnymon epi tēn gēn
kai ekraxen phōnē megalē ōsper leōn mykatai kai ote ekraxen elalēsan ai epta brontai tas eautōn phōnas
kai ote elalēsan ai epta brontai tas phōnas eautōn emellon graphein kai ēkousa phōnēn ek tou ouranou legousan moi sphragison a elalēsan ai epta brontai kai mē tauta grapsēs
kai o angelos on eidon estōta epi tēs thalassēs kai epi tēs gēs ēren tēn cheira autou eis ton ouranon
kai ōmosen en tō zōnti eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn os ektisen ton ouranon kai ta en autō kai tēn gēn kai ta en autē kai tēn thalassan kai ta en autē oti chronos ouk estai eti
alla en tais ēmerais tēs phōnēs tou ebdomou angelou otan mellē salpizein kai telesthē to mystērion tou theou ōs euēngelisen tois eautou doulois tois prophētais
kai ē phōnē ēn ēkousa ek tou ouranou palin lalousa met emou kai legousa ypage labe to biblaridion to ēneōgmenon en tē cheiri angelou tou estōtos epi tēs thalassēs kai epi tēs gēs
kai apēlthon pros ton angelon legōn autō dos moi to biblaridion kai legei moi labe kai kataphage auto kai pikranei sou tēn koilian all en tō stomati sou estai glyky ōs meli
kai elabon to biblaridion ek tēs cheiros tou angelou kai katephagon auto kai ēn en tō stomati mou ōs meli glyky kai ote ephagon auto epikranthē ē koilia mou
kai legei moi dei se palin prophēteusai epi laois kai ethnesin kai glōssais kai basileusin pollois
kai edothē moi kalamos omoios rabdō kai o angelos eistēkei legōn egeirai kai metrēson ton naon tou theou kai to thysiastērion kai tous proskynountas en autō
kai tēn aulēn tēn exōthen tou naou ekbale exō kai mē autēn metrēsēs oti edothē tois ethnesin kai tēn polin tēn agian patēsousin mēnas tessarakonta dyo
kai dōsō tois dysin martysin mou kai prophēteusousin ēmeras chilias diakosias exēkonta peribeblēmenoi sakkous
outoi eisin ai dyo elaiai kai dyo lychniai ai enōpion tou theou tēs gēs estōsai
kai ei tis autous thelē adikēsai pyr ekporeuetai ek tou stomatos autōn kai katesthiei tous echthrous autōn kai ei tis autous thelē adikēsai outōs dei auton apoktanthēnai

outoi echousin exousian kleisai ton ouranon ina mē brechē yetos en ēmerais autōn tēs prophēteias kai exousian echousin epi tōn ydatōn strephein auta eis aima kai pataxai tēn gēn pasē plēgē osakis ean thelēsōsin
kai otan telesōsin tēn martyrian autōn to thērion to anabainon ek tēs abyssou poiēsei polemon met autōn kai nikēsei autous kai apoktenei autous
kai ta ptōmata autōn epi tēs plateias poleōs tēs megalēs ētis kaleitai pneumatikōs sodoma kai aigyptos opou kai o kyrios ēmōn estaurōthē
kai blepsousin ek tōn laōn kai phylōn kai glōssōn kai ethnōn ta ptōmata autōn ēmeras treis kai ēmisy kai ta ptōmata autōn ouk aphēsousin tethēnai eis mnēmata
kai oi katoikountes epi tēs gēs charousin ep autois kai euphranthēsontai kai dōra pempsousin allēlois oti outoi oi dyo prophētai ebasanisan tous katoikountas epi tēs gēs
kai meta tas treis ēmeras kai ēmisy pneuma zōēs ek tou theou eisēlthen ep autous kai estēsan epi tous podas autōn kai phobos megas epesen epi tous theōrountas autous
kai ēkousan phōnēn megalēn ek tou ouranou legousan autois anabēte ōde kai anebēsan eis ton ouranon en tē nephelē kai etheōrēsan autous oi echthroi autōn

kai en ekeinē tē ōra egeneto seismos megas kai to dekaton tēs poleōs epesen kai apektanthēsan en tō seismō onomata anthrōpōn chiliades epta kai oi loipoi emphoboi egenonto kai edōkan doxan tō theō tou ouranou
ē ouai ē deutera apēlthen idou ē ouai ē tritē erchetai tachy
kai o ebdomos angelos esalpisen kai egenonto phōnai megalai en tō ouranō legousai egenonto ai basileiai tou kosmou tou kyriou ēmōn kai tou christou autou kai basileusei eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn
kai oi eikosi kai tessares presbyteroi oi enōpion tou theou kathēmenoi epi tous thronous autōn epesan epi ta prosōpa autōn kai prosekynēsan tō theō
legontes eucharistoumen soi kyrie o theos o pantokratōr o ōn kai o ēn kai o erchomenos oti eilēphas tēn dynamin sou tēn megalēn kai ebasileusas

kai ta ethnē ōrgisthēsan kai ēlthen ē orgē sou kai o kairos tōn nekrōn krithēnai kai dounai ton misthon tois doulois sou tois prophētais kai tois agiois kai tois phoboumenois to onoma sou tois mikrois kai tois megalois kai diaphtheirai tous diaphtheirontas tēn gēn
kai ēnoigē o naos tou theou en tō ouranō kai ōphthē ē kibōtos tēs diathēkēs autou en tō naō autou kai egenonto astrapai kai phōnai kai brontai kai seismos kai chalaza megalē
kai sēmeion mega ōphthē en tō ouranō gynē peribeblēmenē ton ēlion kai ē selēnē ypokatō tōn podōn autēs kai epi tēs kephalēs autēs stephanos asterōn dōdeka
kai en gastri echousa krazei ōdinousa kai basanizomenē tekein
kai ōphthē allo sēmeion en tō ouranō kai idou drakōn megas pyrros echōn kephalas epta kai kerata deka kai epi tas kephalas autou diadēmata epta
kai ē oura autou syrei to triton tōn asterōn tou ouranou kai ebalen autous eis tēn gēn kai o drakōn estēken enōpion tēs gynaikos tēs mellousēs tekein ina otan tekē to teknon autēs kataphagē
kai eteken uion arrena os mellei poimainein panta ta ethnē en rabdō sidēra kai ērpasthē to teknon autēs pros ton theon kai ton thronon autou
kai ē gynē ephygen eis tēn erēmon opou echei topon ētoimasmenon apo tou theou ina ekei trephōsin autēn ēmeras chilias diakosias exēkonta
kai egeneto polemos en tō ouranō o michaēl kai oi angeloi autou epolemēsan kata tou drakontos kai o drakōn epolemēsen kai oi angeloi autou
kai ouk ischysan oute topos eurethē autōn eti en tō ouranō
kai eblēthē o drakōn o megas o ophis o archaios o kaloumenos diabolos kai o satanas o planōn tēn oikoumenēn olēn eblēthē eis tēn gēn kai oi angeloi autou met autou eblēthēsan

kai ēkousa phōnēn megalēn legousan en tō ouranō arti egeneto ē sōtēria kai ē dynamis kai ē basileia tou theou ēmōn kai ē exousia tou christou autou oti kateblēthē o katēgoros tōn adelphōn ēmōn o katēgorōn autōn enōpion tou theou ēmōn ēmeras kai nyktos
kai autoi enikēsan auton dia to aima tou arniou kai dia ton logon tēs martyrias autōn kai ouk ēgapēsan tēn psychēn autōn achri thanatou
dia touto euphrainesthe oi ouranoi kai oi en autois skēnountes ouai tois katoikousin tēn gēn kai tēn thalassan oti katebē o diabolos pros ymas echōn thymon megan eidōs oti oligon kairon echei
kai ote eiden o drakōn oti eblēthē eis tēn gēn ediōxen tēn gynaika ētis eteken ton arrena
kai edothēsan tē gynaiki dyo pteryges tou aetou tou megalou ina petētai eis tēn erēmon eis ton topon autēs opou trephetai ekei kairon kai kairous kai ēmisy kairou apo prosōpou tou opheōs
kai ebalen o ophis opisō tēs gynaikos ek tou stomatos autou ydōr ōs potamon ina tautēn potamophorēton poiēsē
kai eboēthēsen ē gē tē gynaiki kai ēnoixen ē gē to stoma autēs kai katepien ton potamon on ebalen o drakōn ek tou stomatos autou
kai ōrgisthē o drakōn epi tē gynaiki kai apēlthen poiēsai polemon meta tōn loipōn tou spermatos autēs tōn tērountōn tas entolas tou theou kai echontōn tēn martyrian tou iēsou christou

kai estathēn epi tēn ammon tēs thalassēs kai eidon ek tēs thalassēs thērion anabainon echon kephalas epta kai kerata deka kai epi tōn keratōn autou deka diadēmata kai epi tas kephalas autou onoma blasphēmias
kai to thērion o eidon ēn omoion pardalei kai oi podes autou ōs arktou kai to stoma autou ōs stoma leontos kai edōken autō o drakōn tēn dynamin autou kai ton thronon autou kai exousian megalēn
kai eidon mian tōn kephalōn autou ōs esphagmenēn eis thanaton kai ē plēgē tou thanatou autou etherapeuthē kai ethaumasen olē ē gē opisō tou thēriou
kai prosekynēsan ton drakonta os edōken exousian tō thēriō kai prosekynēsan to thērion legontes tis omoios tō thēriō tis dynatai polemēsai met autou
kai edothē autō stoma laloun megala kai blasphēmias kai edothē autō exousia polemon poiēsai mēnas tessarakonta dyo
kai ēnoixen to stoma autou eis blasphēmian pros ton theon blasphēmēsai to onoma autou kai tēn skēnēn autou kai tous en tō ouranō skēnountas
kai edothē autō polemon poiēsai meta tōn agiōn kai nikēsai autous kai edothē autō exousia epi pasan phylēn kai glōssan kai ethnos
kai proskynēsousin autō pantes oi katoikountes epi tēs gēs ōn ou gegraptai ta onomata en tē biblō tēs zōēs tou arniou esphagmenou apo katabolēs kosmou
ei tis echei ous akousatō
ei tis aichmalōsian synagei eis aichmalōsian ypagei ei tis en machaira apoktenei dei auton en machaira apoktanthēnai ōde estin ē ypomonē kai ē pistis tōn agiōn
kai eidon allo thērion anabainon ek tēs gēs kai eichen kerata dyo omoia arniō kai elalei ōs drakōn
kai tēn exousian tou prōtou thēriou pasan poiei enōpion autou kai poiei tēn gēn kai tous katoikountas en autē ina proskynēsōsin to thērion to prōton ou etherapeuthē ē plēgē tou thanatou autou
kai poiei sēmeia megala ina kai pyr poiē katabainein ek tou ouranou eis tēn gēn enōpion tōn anthrōpōn
kai plana tous katoikountas epi tēs gēs dia ta sēmeia a edothē autō poiēsai enōpion tou thēriou legōn tois katoikousin epi tēs gēs poiēsai eikona tō thēriō o echei tēn plēgēn tēs machairas kai ezēsen
kai edothē autō dounai pneuma tē eikoni tou thēriou ina kai lalēsē ē eikōn tou thēriou kai poiēsē osoi an mē proskynēsōsin tēn eikona tou thēriou ina apoktanthōsin

kai poiei pantas tous mikrous kai tous megalous kai tous plousious kai tous ptōchous kai tous eleutherous kai tous doulous ina dōsē autois charagma epi tēs cheiros autōn tēs dexias ē epi tōn metōpōn autōn
kai ina mē tis dynētai agorasai ē pōlēsai ei mē o echōn to charagma ē to onoma tou thēriou ē ton arithmon tou onomatos autou
ōde ē sophia estin o echōn ton noun psēphisatō ton arithmon tou thēriou arithmos gar anthrōpou estin kai o arithmos autou chxs
kai eidon kai idou arnion estēkos epi to oros siōn kai met autou ekaton tessarakonta tessares chiliades echousai to onoma tou patros autou gegrammenon epi tōn metōpōn autōn
kai ēkousa phōnēn ek tou ouranou ōs phōnēn ydatōn pollōn kai ōs phōnēn brontēs megalēs kai phōnēn ēkousa kitharōdōn kitharizontōn en tais kitharais autōn

kai adousin ōs ōdēn kainēn enōpion tou thronou kai enōpion tōn tessarōn zōōn kai tōn presbyterōn kai oudeis ēdynato mathein tēn ōdēn ei mē ai ekaton tessarakonta tessares chiliades oi ēgorasmenoi apo tēs gēs
outoi eisin oi meta gynaikōn ouk emolynthēsan parthenoi gar eisin outoi eisin oi akolouthountes tō arniō opou an ypagē outoi ēgorasthēsan apo tōn anthrōpōn aparchē tō theō kai tō arniō
kai en tō stomati autōn ouch eurethē dolos amōmoi gar eisin enōpion tou thronou tou theou
kai eidon allon angelon petōmenon en mesouranēmati echonta euangelion aiōnion euangelisai tous katoikountas epi tēs gēs kai pan ethnos kai phylēn kai glōssan kai laon
legonta en phōnē megalē phobēthēte ton theon kai dote autō doxan oti ēlthen ē ōra tēs kriseōs autou kai proskynēsate tō poiēsanti ton ouranon kai tēn gēn kai thalassan kai pēgas ydatōn
kai allos angelos ēkolouthēsen legōn epesen epesen baboulōn ē polis ē megalē oti ek tou oinou tou thymou tēs porneias autēs pepotiken panta ethnē
kai tritos angelos ēkolouthēsen autois legōn en phōnē megalē ei tis to thērion proskynei kai tēn eikona autou kai lambanei charagma epi tou metōpou autou ē epi tēn cheira autou
kai autos pietai ek tou oinou tou thymou tou theou tou kekerasmenou akratou en tō potēriō tēs orgēs autou kai basanisthēsetai en pyri kai theiō enōpion tōn agiōn angelōn kai enōpion tou arniou

kai o kapnos tou basanismou autōn anabainei eis aiōnas aiōnōn kai ouk echousin anapausin ēmeras kai nyktos oi proskynountes to thērion kai tēn eikona autou kai ei tis lambanei to charagma tou onomatos autou
ōde ypomonē tōn agiōn estin ōde oi tērountes tas entolas tou theou kai tēn pistin iēsou

kai ēkousa phōnēs ek tou ouranou legousēs moi grapson makarioi oi nekroi oi en kyriō apothnēskontes aparti nai legei to pneuma ina anapausōntai ek tōn kopōn autōn ta de erga autōn akolouthei met autōn
kai eidon kai idou nephelē leukē kai epi tēn nephelēn kathēmenos omoios uiō anthrōpou echōn epi tēs kephalēs autou stephanon chrysoun kai en tē cheiri autou drepanon oxy
kai allos angelos exēlthen ek tou naou krazōn en megalē phōnē tō kathēmenō epi tēs nephelēs pempson to drepanon sou kai therison oti ēlthen soi ē ōra tou therisai oti exēranthē o therismos tēs gēs
kai ebalen o kathēmenos epi tēn nephelēn to drepanon autou epi tēn gēn kai etheristhē ē gē
kai allos angelos exēlthen ek tou naou tou en tō ouranō echōn kai autos drepanon oxy

kai allos angelos exēlthen ek tou thysiastēriou echōn exousian epi tou pyros kai ephōnēsen kraugē megalē tō echonti to drepanon to oxy legōn pempson sou to drepanon to oxy kai trygēson tous botryas tēs ampelou tēs gēs oti ēkmasan ai staphylai autēs
kai ebalen o angelos to drepanon autou eis tēn gēn kai etrygēsen tēn ampelon tēs gēs kai ebalen eis tēn lēnon tou thymou tou theou tēn megalēn
kai epatēthē ē lēnos exō tēs poleōs kai exēlthen aima ek tēs lēnou achri tōn chalinōn tōn ippōn apo stadiōn chiliōn exakosiōn
kai eidon allo sēmeion en tō ouranō mega kai thaumaston angelous epta echontas plēgas epta tas eschatas oti en autais etelesthē o thymos tou theou

kai eidon ōs thalassan yalinēn memigmenēn pyri kai tous nikōntas ek tou thēriou kai ek tēs eikonos autou kai ek tou charagmatos autou ek tou arithmou tou onomatos autou estōtas epi tēn thalassan tēn yalinēn echontas kitharas tou theou
kai adousin tēn ōdēn mōseōs doulou tou theou kai tēn ōdēn tou arniou legontes megala kai thaumasta ta erga sou kyrie o theos o pantokratōr dikaiai kai alēthinai ai odoi sou o basileus tōn agiōn
tis ou mē phobēthē se kyrie kai doxasē to onoma sou oti monos osios oti panta ta ethnē ēxousin kai proskynēsousin enōpion sou oti ta dikaiōmata sou ephanerōthēsan
kai meta tauta eidon kai idou ēnoigē o naos tēs skēnēs tou martyriou en tō ouranō
kai exēlthon oi epta angeloi echontes tas epta plēgas ek tou naou endedymenoi linon katharon kai lampron kai periezōsmenoi peri ta stēthē zōnas chrysas
kai en ek tōn tessarōn zōōn edōken tois epta angelois epta phialas chrysas gemousas tou thymou tou theou tou zōntos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn
kai egemisthē o naos kapnou ek tēs doxēs tou theou kai ek tēs dynameōs autou kai oudeis ēdynato eiselthein eis ton naon achri telesthōsin ai epta plēgai tōn epta angelōn
kai ēkousa phōnēs megalēs ek tou naou legousēs tois epta angelois ypagete kai ekcheate tas phialas tou thymou tou theou eis tēn gēn
kai apēlthen o prōtos kai execheen tēn phialēn autou epi tēn gēn kai egeneto elkos kakon kai ponēron eis tous anthrōpous tous echontas to charagma tou thēriou kai tous tē eikoni autou proskynountas
kai o deuteros angelos execheen tēn phialēn autou eis tēn thalassan kai egeneto aima ōs nekrou kai pasa psychē zōsa apethanen en tē thalassē
kai o tritos angelos execheen tēn phialēn autou eis tous potamous kai eis tas pēgas tōn ydatōn kai egeneto aima
kai ēkousa tou angelou tōn ydatōn legontos dikaios kyrie ei o ōn kai o ēn kai o osios oti tauta ekrinas
oti aima agiōn kai prophētōn exechean kai aima autois edōkas piein axioi gar eisin
kai ēkousa allou ek tou thysiastēriou legontos nai kyrie o theos o pantokratōr alēthinai kai dikaiai ai kriseis sou
kai o tetartos angelos execheen tēn phialēn autou epi ton ēlion kai edothē autō kaumatisai tous anthrōpous en pyri
kai ekaumatisthēsan oi anthrōpoi kauma mega kai eblasphēmēsan to onoma tou theou tou echontos exousian epi tas plēgas tautas kai ou metenoēsan dounai autō doxan
kai o pemptos angelos execheen tēn phialēn autou epi ton thronon tou thēriou kai egeneto ē basileia autou eskotōmenē kai emassōnto tas glōssas autōn ek tou ponou
kai eblasphēmēsan ton theon tou ouranou ek tōn ponōn autōn kai ek tōn elkōn autōn kai ou metenoēsan ek tōn ergōn autōn
kai o ektos angelos execheen tēn phialēn autou epi ton potamon ton megan ton euphratēn kai exēranthē to ydōr autou ina etoimasthē ē odos tōn basileōn tōn apo anatolōn ēliou
kai eidon ek tou stomatos tou drakontos kai ek tou stomatos tou thēriou kai ek tou stomatos tou pseudoprophētou pneumata tria akatharta omoia batrachois
eisin gar pneumata daimonōn poiounta sēmeia a ekporeuetai epi tous basileis tēs gēs kai tēs oikoumenēs olēs synagagein autous eis polemon tēs ēmeras ekeinēs tēs megalēs tou theou tou pantokratoros
idou erchomai ōs kleptēs makarios o grēgorōn kai tērōn ta imatia autou ina mē gymnos peripatē kai blepōsin tēn aschēmosynēn autou
kai synēgagen autous eis ton topon ton kaloumenon ebraisti armageddōn
kai o ebdomos angelos execheen tēn phialēn autou eis ton aera kai exēlthen phōnē megalē apo tou naou tou ouranou apo tou thronou legousa gegonen
kai egenonto phōnai kai brontai kai astrapai kai seismos egeneto megas oios ouk egeneto aph ou oi anthrōpoi egenonto epi tēs gēs tēlikoutos seismos outōs megas
kai egeneto ē polis ē megalē eis tria merē kai ai poleis tōn ethnōn epeson kai babylōn ē megalē emnēsthē enōpion tou theou dounai autē to potērion tou oinou tou thymou tēs orgēs autou
kai pasa nēsos ephygen kai orē ouch eurethēsan
kai chalaza megalē ōs talantiaia katabainei ek tou ouranou epi tous anthrōpous kai eblasphēmēsan oi anthrōpoi ton theon ek tēs plēgēs tēs chalazēs oti megalē estin ē plēgē autēs sphodra
kai ēlthen eis ek tōn epta angelōn tōn echontōn tas epta phialas kai elalēsen met emou legōn moi deuro deixō soi to krima tēs pornēs tēs megalēs tēs kathēmenēs epi tōn ydatōn tōn pollōn
meth ēs eporneusan oi basileis tēs gēs kai emethysthēsan ek tou oinou tēs porneias autēs oi katoikountes tēn gēn
kai apēnenken me eis erēmon en pneumati kai eidon gynaika kathēmenēn epi thērion kokkinon gemon onomatōn blasphēmias echon kephalas epta kai kerata deka
kai ē gynē ē peribeblēmenē porphyra kai kokkinō kai kechrysōmenē chrysō kai lithō timiō kai margaritais echousa chrysoun potērion en tē cheiri autēs gemon bdelygmatōn kai akathartētos porneias autēs
kai epi to metōpon autēs onoma gegrammenon mystērion babylōn ē megalē ē mētēr tōn pornōn kai tōn bdelygmatōn tēs gēs
kai eidon tēn gynaika methyousan ek tou aimatos tōn agiōn kai ek tou aimatos tōn martyrōn iēsou kai ethaumasa idōn autēn thauma mega
kai eipen moi o angelos dia ti ethaumasas egō soi erō to mystērion tēs gynaikos kai tou thēriou tou bastazontos autēn tou echontos tas epta kephalas kai ta deka kerata

thērion o eides ēn kai ouk estin kai mellei anabainein ek tēs abyssou kai eis apōleian ypagein kai thaumasontai oi katoikountes epi tēs gēs ōn ou gegraptai ta onomata epi to biblion tēs zōēs apo katabolēs kosmou blepontes to thērion o ti ēn kai ouk estin kaiper estin
ōde o nous o echōn sophian ai epta kephalai orē eisin epta opou ē gynē kathētai ep autōn
kai basileis epta eisin oi pente epesan kai o eis estin o allos oupō ēlthen kai otan elthē oligon auton dei meinai
kai to thērion o ēn kai ouk estin kai autos ogdoos estin kai ek tōn epta estin kai eis apōleian ypagei
kai ta deka kerata a eides deka basileis eisin oitines basileian oupō elabon all exousian ōs basileis mian ōran lambanousin meta tou thēriou
outoi mian gnōmēn echousin kai tēn dynamin kai tēn exousian eautōn tō thēriō diadidōsousin
outoi meta tou arniou polemēsousin kai to arnion nikēsei autous oti kyrios kyriōn estin kai basileus basileōn kai oi met autou klētoi kai eklektoi kai pistoi
kai legei moi ta ydata a eides ou ē pornē kathētai laoi kai ochloi eisin kai ethnē kai glōssai
kai ta deka kerata a eides epi to thērion outoi misēsousin tēn pornēn kai ērēmōmenēn poiēsousin autēn kai gymnēn kai tas sarkas autēs phagontai kai autēn katakausousin en pyri
o gar theos edōken eis tas kardias autōn poiēsai tēn gnōmēn autou kai poiēsai mian gnōmēn kai dounai tēn basileian autōn tō thēriō achri telesthē ta rēmata tou theou
kai ē gynē ēn eides estin ē polis ē megalē ē echousa basileian epi tōn basileōn tēs gēs
kai meta tauta eidon angelon katabainonta ek tou ouranou echonta exousian megalēn kai ē gē ephōtisthē ek tēs doxēs autou
kai ekraxen en ischui phōnē megalē legōn epesen epesen babylōn ē megalē kai egeneto katoikētērion daimonōn kai phylakē pantos pneumatos akathartou kai phylakē pantos orneou akathartou kai memisēmenou
oti ek tou oinou tou thymou tēs porneias autēs pepōken panta ta ethnē kai oi basileis tēs gēs met autēs eporneusan kai oi emporoi tēs gēs ek tēs dynameōs tou strēnous autēs eploutēsan
kai ēkousa allēn phōnēn ek tou ouranou legousan exelthete ex autēs o laos mou ina mē synkoinōnēsēte tais amartiais autēs kai ina mē labēte ek tōn plēgōn autēs
oti ēkolouthēsan autēs ai amartiai achri tou ouranou kai emnēmoneusen o theos ta adikēmata autēs
apodote autē ōs kai autē apedōken ymin kai diplōsate autē dipla kata ta erga autēs en tō potēriō ō ekerasen kerasate autē diploun
osa edoxasen eautēn kai estrēniasen tosouton dote autē basanismon kai penthos oti en tē kardia autēs legei kathēmai basilissa kai chēra ouk eimi kai penthos ou mē idō
dia touto en mia ēmera ēxousin ai plēgai autēs thanatos kai penthos kai limos kai en pyri katakauthēsetai oti ischyros kyrios o theos o krinōn autēn
kai klausontai autēn kai kopsontai ep autē oi basileis tēs gēs oi met autēs porneusantes kai strēniasantes otan blepōsin ton kapnon tēs pyrōseōs autēs
apo makrothen estēkotes dia ton phobon tou basanismou autēs legontes ouai ouai ē polis ē megalē babylōn ē polis ē ischyra oti en mia ōra ēlthen ē krisis sou
kai oi emporoi tēs gēs klaiousin kai penthousin ep autē oti ton gomon autōn oudeis agorazei ouketi

gomon chrysou kai argyrou kai lithou timiou kai margaritou kai byssou kai porphyras kai sērikou kai kokkinou kai pan xylon thuinon kai pan skeuos elephantinon kai pan skeuos ek xylou timiōtatou kai chalkou kai sidērou kai marmarou
kai kinamōmon kai thymiamata kai myron kai libanon kai oinon kai elaion kai semidalin kai siton kai ktēnē kai probata kai ippōn kai redōn kai sōmatōn kai psychas anthrōpōn
kai ē opōra tēs epithymias tēs psychēs sou apēlthen apo sou kai panta ta lipara kai ta lampra apēlthen apo sou kai ouketi ou mē eurēsēs auta
oi emporoi toutōn oi ploutēsantes ap autēs apo makrothen stēsontai dia ton phobon tou basanismou autēs klaiontes kai penthountes
kai legontes ouai ouai ē polis ē megalē ē peribeblēmenē byssinon kai porphyroun kai kokkinon kai kechrysōmenoi en chrysō kai lithō timiō kai margaritais
oti mia ōra ērēmōthē o tosoutos ploutos kai pas kybernētēs kai pas epi tōn ploiōn o omilos kai nautai kai osoi tēn thalassan ergazontai apo makrothen estēsan
kai ekrazon orōntes ton kapnon tēs pyrōseōs autēs legontes tis omoia tē polei tē megalē

kai ebalon choun epi tas kephalas autōn kai ekrazon klaiontes kai penthountes legontes ouai ouai ē polis ē megalē en ē eploutēsan pantes oi echontes ploia en tē thalassē ek tēs timiotētos autēs oti mia ōra ērēmōthē
euphrainou ep autēn ourane kai oi agioi apostoloi kai oi prophētai oti ekrinen o theos to krima ymōn ex autēs
kai ēren eis angelos ischyros lithon ōs mylon megan kai ebalen eis tēn thalassan legōn outōs ormēmati blēthēsetai babylōn ē megalē polis kai ou mē eurethē eti
kai phōnē kitharōdōn kai mousikōn kai aulētōn kai salpistōn ou mē akousthē en soi eti kai pas technitēs pasēs technēs ou mē eurethē en soi eti kai phōnē mylou ou mē akousthē en soi eti
kai phōs lychnou ou mē phanē en soi eti kai phōnē nymphiou kai nymphēs ou mē akousthē en soi eti oti oi emporoi sou ēsan oi megistanes tēs gēs oti en tē pharmakeia sou eplanēthēsan panta ta ethnē
kai en autē aima prophētōn kai agiōn eurethē kai pantōn tōn esphagmenōn epi tēs gēs
kai meta tauta ēkousa ōs phōnēn ochlou pollou megalēn en tō ouranō legontos allēlouia ē sōtēria kai ē doxa kai ē timē kai ē dynamis kyriō tō theō ēmōn
oti alēthinai kai dikaiai ai kriseis autou oti ekrinen tēn pornēn tēn megalēn ētis ephtheiren tēn gēn en tē porneia autēs kai exedikēsen to aima tōn doulōn autou ek tēs cheiros autēs
kai deuteron eirēkan allēlouia kai o kapnos autēs anabainei eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn
kai epeson oi presbyteroi oi eikosi kai tessares kai ta tessara zōa kai prosekynēsan tō theō tō kathēmenō epi tou thronou legontes amēn allēlouia
kai phōnē ek tou thronou exēlthen legousa aineite ton theon ēmōn pantes oi douloi autou kai oi phoboumenoi auton kai oi mikroi kai oi megaloi
kai ēkousa ōs phōnēn ochlou pollou kai ōs phōnēn ydatōn pollōn kai ōs phōnēn brontōn ischyrōn legontōn allēlouia oti ebasileusen kyrios o theos o pantokratōr
chairōmen kai agalliōmetha kai dōmen tēn doxan autō oti ēlthen o gamos tou arniou kai ē gynē autou ētoimasen eautēn
kai edothē autē ina peribalētai byssinon katharon kai lampron to gar byssinon ta dikaiōmata estin tōn agiōn
kai legei moi grapson makarioi oi eis to deipnon tou gamou tou arniou keklēmenoi kai legei moi outoi oi logoi alēthinoi eisin tou theou

kai epeson emprosthen tōn podōn autou proskynēsai autō kai legei moi ora mē syndoulos sou eimi kai tōn adelphōn sou tōn echontōn tēn martyrian tou iēsou tō theō proskynēson ē gar martyria tou iēsou estin to pneuma tēs prophēteias
kai eidon ton ouranon aneōgmenon kai idou ippos leukos kai o kathēmenos ep auton kaloumenos pistos kai alēthinos kai en dikaiosynē krinei kai polemei
oi de ophthalmoi autou ōs phlox pyros kai epi tēn kephalēn autou diadēmata polla echōn onoma gegrammenon o oudeis oiden ei mē autos
kai peribeblēmenos imation bebammenon aimati kai kaleitai to onoma autou o logos tou theou
kai ta strateumata ta en tō ouranō ēkolouthei autō eph ippois leukois endedymenoi byssinon leukon kai katharon

kai ek tou stomatos autou ekporeuetai romphaia oxeia ina en autē patassē ta ethnē kai autos poimanei autous en rabdō sidēra kai autos patei tēn lēnon tou oinou tou thymou kai tēs orgēs tou theou tou pantokratoros
kai echei epi to imation kai epi ton mēron autou to onoma gegrammenon basileus basileōn kai kyrios kyriōn
kai eidon ena angelon estōta en tō ēliō kai ekraxen phōnē megalē legōn pasin tois orneois tois petōmenois en mesouranēmati deute kai synagesthe eis to deipnon tou megalou theou
ina phagēte sarkas basileōn kai sarkas chiliarchōn kai sarkas ischyrōn kai sarkas ippōn kai tōn kathēmenōn ep autōn kai sarkas pantōn eleutherōn kai doulōn kai mikrōn kai megalōn
kai eidon to thērion kai tous basileis tēs gēs kai ta strateumata autōn synēgmena poiēsai polemon meta tou kathēmenou epi tou ippou kai meta tou strateumatos autou

kai epiasthē to thērion kai meta toutou o pseudoprophētēs o poiēsas ta sēmeia enōpion autou en ois eplanēsen tous labontas to charagma tou thēriou kai tous proskynountas tē eikoni autou zōntes eblēthēsan oi dyo eis tēn limnēn tou pyros tēn kaiomenēn en tō theiō
kai oi loipoi apektanthēsan en tē romphaia tou kathēmenou epi tou ippou tē ekporeuomenē ek tou stomatos autou kai panta ta ornea echortasthēsan ek tōn sarkōn autōn
kai eidon angelon katabainonta ek tou ouranou echonta tēn kleida tēs abyssou kai alysin megalēn epi tēn cheira autou
kai ekratēsen ton drakonta ton ophin ton archaion os estin diabolos kai satanas kai edēsen auton chilia etē
kai ebalen auton eis tēn abysson kai ekleisen auton kai esphragisen epanō autou ina mē planēsē ta ethnē eti achri telesthē ta chilia etē kai meta tauta dei auton lythēnai mikron chronon

kai eidon thronous kai ekathisan ep autous kai krima edothē autois kai tas psychas tōn pepelekismenōn dia tēn martyrian iēsou kai dia ton logon tou theou kai oitines ou prosekynēsan tō thēriō oute tē eikoni autou kai ouk elabon to charagma epi to metōpon autōn kai epi tēn cheira autōn kai ezēsan kai ebasileusan meta tou christou ta chilia etē
oi de loipoi tōn nekrōn ouk anezēsan eōs telesthē ta chilia etē autē ē anastasis ē prōtē
makarios kai agios o echōn meros en tē anastasei tē prōtē epi toutōn o thanatos o deuteros ouk echei exousian all esontai iereis tou theou kai tou christou kai basileusousin met autou chilia etē
kai otan telesthē ta chilia etē lythēsetai o satanas ek tēs phylakēs autou
kai exeleusetai planēsai ta ethnē ta en tais tessarsin gōniais tēs gēs ton gōg kai ton magōg synagagein autous eis polemon ōn o arithmos ōs ē ammos tēs thalassēs
kai anebēsan epi to platos tēs gēs kai ekyklōsan tēn parembolēn tōn agiōn kai tēn polin tēn ēgapēmenēn kai katebē pyr apo tou theou ek tou ouranou kai katephagen autous
kai o diabolos o planōn autous eblēthē eis tēn limnēn tou pyros kai theiou opou to thērion kai o pseudoprophētēs kai basanisthēsontai ēmeras kai nyktos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn
kai eidon thronon leukon megan kai ton kathēmenon ep autou ou apo prosōpou ephygen ē gē kai o ouranos kai topos ouch eurethē autois

kai eidon tous nekrous mikrous kai megalous estōtas enōpion tou theou kai biblia ēneōchthēsan kai biblion allo ēneōchthē o estin tēs zōēs kai ekrithēsan oi nekroi ek tōn gegrammenōn en tois bibliois kata ta erga autōn
kai edōken ē thalassa tous en autē nekrous kai o thanatos kai o adēs edōkan tous en autois nekrous kai ekrithēsan ekastos kata ta erga autōn
kai o thanatos kai o adēs eblēthēsan eis tēn limnēn tou pyros outos estin o deuteros thanatos
kai ei tis ouch eurethē en tē biblō tēs zōēs gegrammenos eblēthē eis tēn limnēn tou pyros
kai eidon ouranon kainon kai gēn kainēn o gar prōtos ouranos kai ē prōtē gē parēlthen kai ē thalassa ouk estin eti
kai egō iōannēs eidon tēn polin tēn agian ierousalēm kainēn katabainousan apo tou theou ek tou ouranou ētoimasmenēn ōs nymphēn kekosmēmenēn tō andri autēs
kai ēkousa phōnēs megalēs ek tou ouranou legousēs idou ē skēnē tou theou meta tōn anthrōpōn kai skēnōsei met autōn kai autoi laoi autou esontai kai autos o theos estai met autōn theos autōn
kai exaleipsei o theos pan dakryon apo tōn ophthalmōn autōn kai o thanatos ouk estai eti oute penthos oute kraugē oute ponos ouk estai eti oti ta prōta apēlthon
kai eipen o kathēmenos epi tou thronou idou kaina panta poiō kai legei moi grapson oti outoi oi logoi alēthinoi kai pistoi eisin
kai eipen moi gegonen egō eimi to a kai to ō ē archē kai to telos egō tō dipsōnti dōsō ek tēs pēgēs tou ydatos tēs zōēs dōrean
o nikōn klēronomēsei panta kai esomai autō theos kai autos estai moi o uios

deilois de kai apistois kai ebdelygmenois kai phoneusin kai pornois kai pharmakeusin kai eidōlolatrais kai pasin tois pseudesin to meros autōn en tē limnē tē kaiomenē pyri kai theiō o estin deuteros thanatos
kai ēlthen pros me eis tōn epta angelōn tōn echontōn tas epta phialas tas gemousas tōn epta plēgōn tōn eschatōn kai elalēsen met emou legōn deuro deixō soi tēn nymphēn tou arniou tēn gynaika
kai apēnenken me en pneumati ep oros mega kai ypsēlon kai edeixen moi tēn polin tēn megalēn tēn agian ierousalēm katabainousan ek tou ouranou apo tou theou
echousan tēn doxan tou theou kai o phōstēr autēs omoios lithō timiōtatō ōs lithō iaspidi krystallizonti
echousan te teichos mega kai ypsēlon echousan pylōnas dōdeka kai epi tois pylōsin angelous dōdeka kai onomata epigegrammena a estin tōn dōdeka phylōn tōn uiōn israēl
ap anatolēs pylōnes treis apo borra pylōnes treis apo notou pylōnes treis apo dysmōn pylōnes treis
kai to teichos tēs poleōs echon themelious dōdeka kai en autois onomata tōn dōdeka apostolōn tou arniou
kai o lalōn met emou eichen kalamon chrysoun ina metrēsē tēn polin kai tous pylōnas autēs kai to teichos autēs
kai ē polis tetragōnos keitai kai to mēkos autēs tosouton estin oson kai to platos kai emetrēsen tēn polin tō kalamō epi stadious dōdeka chiliadōn to mēkos kai to platos kai to ypsos autēs isa estin
kai emetrēsen to teichos autēs ekaton tessarakonta tessarōn pēchōn metron anthrōpou o estin angelou
kai ēn ē endomēsis tou teichous autēs iaspis kai ē polis chrysion katharon omoia yalō katharō
kai oi themelioi tou teichous tēs poleōs panti lithō timiō kekosmēmenoi o themelios o prōtos iaspis o deuteros sappheiros o tritos chalkēdōn o tetartos smaragdos
o pemptos sardonyx o ektos sardios o ebdomos chrysolithos o ogdoos bēryllos o ennatos topazion o dekatos chrysoprasos o endekatos yakinthos o dōdekatos amethystos
kai oi dōdeka pylōnes dōdeka margaritai ana eis ekastos tōn pylōnōn ēn ex enos margaritou kai ē plateia tēs poleōs chrysion katharon ōs yalos diaphanēs
kai naon ouk eidon en autē o gar kyrios o theos o pantokratōr naos autēs estin kai to arnion
kai ē polis ou chreian echei tou ēliou oude tēs selēnēs ina phainōsin en autē ē gar doxa tou theou ephōtisen autēn kai o lychnos autēs to arnion
kai ta ethnē tōn sōzomenōn en tō phōti autēs peripatēsousin kai oi basileis tēs gēs pherousin tēn doxan kai tēn timēn autōn eis autēn
kai oi pylōnes autēs ou mē kleisthōsin ēmeras nyx gar ouk estai ekei
kai oisousin tēn doxan kai tēn timēn tōn ethnōn eis autēn
kai ou mē eiselthē eis autēn pan koinoun kai poioun bdelygma kai pseudos ei mē oi gegrammenoi en tō bibliō tēs zōēs tou arniou
kai edeixen moi katharon potamon ydatos zōēs lampron ōs krystallon ekporeuomenon ek tou thronou tou theou kai tou arniou
en mesō tēs plateias autēs kai tou potamou enteuthen kai enteuthen xylon zōēs poioun karpous dōdeka kata mēna ena ekaston apodidoun ton karpon autou kai ta phylla tou xylou eis therapeian tōn ethnōn
kai pan katanathema ouk estai eti kai o thronos tou theou kai tou arniou en autē estai kai oi douloi autou latreusousin autō
kai opsontai to prosōpon autou kai to onoma autou epi tōn metōpōn autōn
kai nyx ouk estai ekei kai chreian ouk echousin lychnou kai phōtos ēliou oti kyrios o theos phōtizei autous kai basileusousin eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn
kai eipen moi outoi oi logoi pistoi kai alēthinoi kai kyrios o theos tōn agiōn prophētōn apesteilen ton angelon autou deixai tois doulois autou a dei genesthai en tachei
idou erchomai tachy makarios o tērōn tous logous tēs prophēteias tou bibliou toutou
kai egō iōannēs o blepōn tauta kai akouōn kai ote ēkousa kai eblepsa epeson proskynēsai emprosthen tōn podōn tou angelou tou deiknyontos moi tauta
kai legei moi ora mē syndoulos sou gar eimi kai tōn adelphōn sou tōn prophētōn kai tōn tērountōn tous logous tou bibliou toutou tō theō proskynēson
kai legei moi mē sphragisēs tous logous tēs prophēteias tou bibliou toutou oti o kairos engys estin
o adikōn adikēsatō eti kai o rypōn rypōsatō eti kai o dikaios dikaiōthētō eti kai o agios agiasthētō eti
kai idou erchomai tachy kai o misthos mou met emou apodounai ekastō ōs to ergon autou estai
egō eimi to a kai to ō archē kai telos o prōtos kai o eschatos
makarioi oi poiountes tas entolas autou ina estai ē exousia autōn epi to xylon tēs zōēs kai tois pylōsin eiselthōsin eis tēn polin
exō de oi kynes kai oi pharmakoi kai oi pornoi kai oi phoneis kai oi eidōlolatrai kai pas o philōn kai poiōn pseudos
egō iēsous epempsa ton angelon mou martyrēsai ymin tauta epi tais ekklēsiais egō eimi ē riza kai to genos tou dabid o astēr o lampros kai orthrinos
kai to pneuma kai ē nymphē legousin elthe kai o akouōn eipatō elthe kai o dipsōn elthetō kai o thelōn lambanetō to ydōr zōēs dōrean
symmartyroumai gar panti akouonti tous logous tēs prophēteias tou bibliou toutou ean tis epitithē pros tauta epithēsei o theos ep auton tas plēgas tas gegrammenas en bibliō toutō
kai ean tis aphairē apo tōn logōn biblou tēs prophēteias tautēs aphairēsei o theos to meros autou apo biblou tēs zōēs kai ek tēs poleōs tēs agias kai tōn gegrammenōn en bibliō toutō
legei o martyrōn tauta nai erchomai tachy amēn nai erchou kyrie iēsou
ē charis tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou meta pantōn ymōn amēn
